case_title: JENIECE JOHNSON VS. CATINA NATASHA TURNER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF SERVICE TO FEB-25-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENIECE JOHNSON IS PRESENT.
